raw_consumer_statement: My Citi credit card was fraudulently charged {$40.00} on XX/XX/year> at XXXX in XXXX XXXX , FL, {$740.00} at XXXX  in XXXX, Fl, and {$1000.00} at Best Buy in XXXX, FL. I live and work in XXXX, FL and was nowhere near these places on XX/XX/year>. I asked that these charges be removed and they were temporarily, but then they were put back on my card. Citi claimed I " accepted responsibility '' for these transactions because the merchant reported that my account number was provided at the time of purchase. I did not make, approve, or authorize these transactions, nor did I provide my account information to the merchant in question. To properly evaluate this matter, I requested that Citi provide the documentation used to determine whether the charges were authorized, including : The transaction receipt or signed authorization The IP address, device data, or digital authorization record ( if online ) Address Verification System ( AVS ) results Any delivery confirmation or shipping address associated with the transactions The merchants response submitted during your investigation Citi has not provided ANY of these
